{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0144fGxF93UAaH1HEknVje2e","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\n    15→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    16→const globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\n    17→if (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n    18→  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    19→    const now = Date.now();\n    20→    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    21→      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    22→      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    23→        store.delete(key);\n    24→      }\n    25→    }\n    26→  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    27→}\n    28→\n    29→/**\n    30→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    31→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    32→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    33→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    34→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    35→ */\n    36→export function checkRateLimit(\n    37→  key: string,\n    38→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    39→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    40→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    41→  const now = Date.now();\n    42→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    43→\n    44→  if (!entry) {\n    45→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    46→    store.set(key, entry);\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    50→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    51→\n    52→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    53→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    54→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    55→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    59→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    60→}\n    61→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"c0d2d672-14b9-4871-a265-031dac004063","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:39.647Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a72a243d78b6626fe","tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":18257,"tool_uses":9,"duration_ms":10255},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"0fa4f2d1-5b7b-46b2-8661-81a1a8112402","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TNGsk8nAp1xDYWmPMhZxB6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    77→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    78→    pendingApplicants = db\n    79→      .prepare(\n    80→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    81→         FROM listing_applications la\n    82→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    83→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    84→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    85→      )\n    86→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    87→  }\n    88→\n    89→  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data\n    90→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    91→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients\n    92→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    93→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    94→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    95→  }\n    96→\n    97→  return NextResponse.json({\n    98→    listing: {\n    99→      ...safeListingData,\n   100→      members,\n   101→      memberCount: members.length,\n   102→      isMember,\n   103→      isAuthor,\n   104→      hasApplied,\n   105→      applicationStatus,\n   106→      pendingApplicants,\n   107→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   108→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   109→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   110→    },\n   111→  });\n   112→}\n   113→\n   114→export async function PATCH(\n   115→  req: NextRequest,\n   116→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   117→) {\n   118→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   119→  if (!session) {\n   120→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   121→  }\n   122→\n   123→  const { id } = await params;\n   124→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   125→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   126→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   127→  }\n   128→\n   129→  const listing = db\n   130→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   131→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   132→\n   133→  if (!listing) {\n   134→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   135→  }\n   136→\n   137→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   138→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   142→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   145→      { status: 400 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  }\n   148→\n   149→  try {\n   150→    const body = await req.json();\n   151→    const {\n   152→      language,\n   153→      readingPace,\n   154→      startDate,\n   155→      meetingFormat,\n   156→      maxGroupSize,\n   157→      requiresApproval,\n   158→      platformPreference,\n   159→    } = body;\n   160→\n   161→    // Validate fields that are provided\n   162→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   163→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   164→    }\n   165→\n   166→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   167→      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   168→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   169→      }\n   170→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   171→      if (startDate < today) {\n   172→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   173→      }\n   174→    }\n   175→\n   176→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n   177→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   178→    }\n   179→\n   180→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   181→      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   182→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   183→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   184→      }\n   185→\n   186→      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n   187→      const memberCount = (db\n   188→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   189→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   190→\n   191→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   192→        return NextResponse.json(\n   193→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   194→          { status: 400 }\n   195→        );\n   196→      }\n   197→    }\n   198→\n   199→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   200→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   201→    }\n   202→\n   203→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   204→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   205→    }\n   206→\n   207→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   208→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   209→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   210→\n   211→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   212→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   213→      values.push(language);\n   214→    }\n   215→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   216→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   217→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   218→    }\n   219→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   220→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   221→      values.push(startDate);\n   222→    }\n   223→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   224→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   225→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   226→    }\n   227→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   228→      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   229→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   230→      values.push(newSize);\n   231→\n   232→      // Atomically set is_full based on actual member count at update time\n   233→      // This avoids a race condition where a concurrent join could fill the group\n   234→      // between our COUNT(*) read and the UPDATE write.\n   235→      if (listing.is_full) {\n   236→        updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n   237→        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n   238→      }\n   239→    }\n   240→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   241→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   242→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   243→    }\n   244→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   245→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   246→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   247→    }\n   248→\n   249→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   250→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   251→    }\n   252→\n   253→    values.push(listingId);\n   254→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   255→\n   256→    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)\n   257→    try {\n   258→      const members = db\n   259→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   260→        .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   261→\n   262→      if (members.length > 0) {\n   263→        const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   264→        for (const member of members) {\n   265→          createNotification(\n   266→            member.user_id,\n   267→            listingId,\n   268→            \"listing_updated\",\n   269→            `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" has been updated by the organizer.`\n   270→          );\n   271→        }\n   272→      }\n   273→    } catch (notifErr) {\n   274→      console.error(\"Notification error (update succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   275→    }\n   276→\n   277→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   278→  } catch (error) {\n   279→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   280→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   281→  }\n   282→}\n   283→\n   284→export async function DELETE(\n   285→  _req: NextRequest,\n   286→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   287→) {\n   288→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   289→  if (!session) {\n   290→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   291→  }\n   292→\n   293→  const { id } = await params;\n   294→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   295→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   296→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   297→  }\n   298→\n   299→  const listing = db\n   300→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   301→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   302→\n   303→  if (!listing) {\n   304→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   305→  }\n   306→\n   307→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   308→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   309→  }\n   310→\n   311→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   312→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   313→    return NextResponse.json(\n   314→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   315→      { status: 400 }\n   316→    );\n   317→  }\n   318→\n   319→  try {\n   320→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   321→    const members = db\n   322→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   323→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   324→\n   325→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   326→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   327→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   328→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   329→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   330→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   331→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   332→    });\n   333→\n   334→    deleteTransaction();\n   335→\n   336→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   337→    for (const member of members) {\n   338→      try {\n   339→        createNotification(\n   340→          member.user_id,\n   341→          null,\n   342→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   343→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   344→        );\n   345→      } catch {\n   346→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   347→      }\n   348→    }\n   349→\n   350→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   351→  } catch (error) {\n   352→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   353→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   354→  }\n   355→}\n   356→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"7b3d3e9a-5cb2-4e7d-885d-8a1e1a534f2c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:41.895Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01E7QVBbg4zG8StxZYGeveD7","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull, notifyListingAuthor } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    85→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    86→\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\n    89→          .prepare(\n    90→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    91→          )\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n    93→\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n    95→          db.prepare(\n    96→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\n    98→        }\n    99→\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   101→      }\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   103→    });\n   104→\n   105→    try {\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   107→\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   109→      try {\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   111→\n   112→        // Notify the author that a new member has joined (same as direct-join flow)\n   113→        const applicant = db\n   114→          .prepare(\"SELECT display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n   115→          .get(applicantUserId) as { display_name: string } | undefined;\n   116→        if (applicant) {\n   117→          notifyListingAuthor(listingId, applicant.display_name);\n   118→        }\n   119→\n   120→        if (result.isFull) {\n   121→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   122→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   123→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   124→          }\n   125→        }\n   126→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   127→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   128→      }\n   129→\n   130→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   131→    } catch (err) {\n   132→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   133→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   134→    }\n   135→  } else {\n   136→    // Reject\n   137→    db.prepare(\n   138→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   139→    ).run(applicationId);\n   140→\n   141→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   142→\n   143→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→  }\n   145→}\n   146→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"296fc75c-8e8f-4256-a288-0da1553109e6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:42.007Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a72a243d78b6626fe","tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":18331,"tool_uses":11,"duration_ms":11072},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"39ec2a0e-a468-4256-a6b6-80be541cdbc8","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01TdMpf4Qhx2xJSLh5TWbJon","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01PgK5obALX2dBSzd5iUoT8C","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3403,"cache_read_input_tokens":14576,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3403,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"a833a3bb-c991-4694-b563-e9b2e4b097c8"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PgK5obALX2dBSzd5iUoT8C","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    72→    const { count } = db\n    73→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    74→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    75→\n    76→    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    77→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    78→    }\n    79→\n    80→    db.prepare(\n    81→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    82→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    83→\n    84→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    85→    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    86→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n    90→  });\n    91→\n    92→  const result = joinTransaction();\n    93→\n    94→  if (result.error) {\n    95→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n    99→  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   100→\n   101→  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n   102→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   106→}\n   107→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"8260acb2-83c6-44a3-9db3-77d638cfece8","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:42.503Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01TA1UN18KtfUaE9eYMfMnCZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_019wJpFqCSin1uihCCzugzU2","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":11724,"cache_read_input_tokens":14576,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":11724,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"defcaf37-f961-4848-866c-4765419a62d3"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019wJpFqCSin1uihCCzugzU2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n    48→  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    49→    // Check if already a member\n    50→    const isMember = db\n    51→      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    52→      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    53→\n    54→    if (isMember) {\n    55→      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    59→    const currentListing = db\n    60→      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    61→      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n    62→\n    63→    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n    64→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    68→    const existingApp = db\n    69→      .prepare(\n    70→        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    71→      )\n    72→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→    if (existingApp) {\n    75→      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    76→        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n    77→      }\n    78→      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    79→        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n    80→      }\n    81→      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    82→      db.prepare(\n    83→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    84→      ).run(existingApp.id);\n    85→\n    86→      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    // Insert new application\n    90→    db.prepare(\n    91→      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    92→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    93→\n    94→    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"88a5ed73-f457-4172-af6a-012cf3f366cb","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:44.815Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a72a243d78b6626fe","tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","description":"Reading app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":26720,"tool_uses":13,"duration_ms":13759},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"9c1b7ffd-1d6f-4628-8df0-bccb9fc6c111","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01TA1UN18KtfUaE9eYMfMnCZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DAncFnA9xVoxm5aaRteMCs","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":11724,"cache_read_input_tokens":14576,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":11724,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"5e414021-9473-4da8-8a77-302a921688b3"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DAncFnA9xVoxm5aaRteMCs","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    16→ *\n    17→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    18→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    19→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    20→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    21→ *\n    22→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    23→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    24→ */\n    25→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    26→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    27→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    28→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    30→  }\n    31→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    32→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    37→  try {\n    38→    update = await req.json();\n    39→  } catch {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    44→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    45→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    46→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    51→  if (update.message) {\n    52→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    53→  }\n    54→\n    55→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→\n    59→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    60→  chat: {\n    61→    id: number;\n    62→    title?: string;\n    63→    type: string;\n    64→  };\n    65→  from: {\n    66→    id: number;\n    67→    first_name: string;\n    68→  };\n    69→  new_chat_member: {\n    70→    user: {\n    71→      id: number;\n    72→      is_bot: boolean;\n    73→    };\n    74→    status: string;\n    75→  };\n    76→}\n    77→\n    78→interface TelegramMessage {\n    79→  chat: {\n    80→    id: number;\n    81→    type: string;\n    82→    title?: string;\n    83→  };\n    84→  text?: string;\n    85→  from?: {\n    86→    id: number;\n    87→  };\n    88→}\n    89→\n    90→/**\n    91→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    92→ *\n    93→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    94→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    95→ * 1. Creates the group\n    96→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    97→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    98→ *\n    99→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   100→ */\n   101→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   102→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   103→\n   104→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   105→  if (\n   106→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   107→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   108→  ) {\n   109→    return;\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  // Only process group chats\n   113→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   114→    return;\n   115→  }\n   116→\n   117→  // The bot was added to a group. Since we can't determine the listing from\n   118→  // the my_chat_member event alone, send a welcome message and wait for the\n   119→  // /start payload or /link command to establish the association.\n   120→  await sendMessage(\n   121→    chat.id,\n   122→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   123→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   124→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   125→  );\n   126→\n   127→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   128→  try {\n   129→    db.prepare(\n   130→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   131→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   132→  } catch {\n   133→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   134→  }\n   135→}\n   136→\n   137→/**\n   138→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   139→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   140→ */\n   141→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   142→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   143→    return;\n   144→  }\n   145→\n   146→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   147→\n   148→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   149→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   150→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   151→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   152→    if (listingId) {\n   153→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   154→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   155→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   156→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   157→        return;\n   158→      }\n   159→\n   160→      const linkedUser = db\n   161→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   162→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   163→\n   164→      if (linkedUser) {\n   165→        const listing = db\n   166→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   167→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   168→\n   169→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   170→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   171→          return;\n   172→        }\n   173→      }\n   174→\n   175→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   176→      await sendMessage(\n   177→        message.chat.id,\n   178→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   179→      );\n   180→      return;\n   181→    }\n   182→  }\n   183→\n   184→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   185→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   186→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   187→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   188→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   189→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   190→      return;\n   191→    }\n   192→\n   193→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   194→    const linkedUser = db\n   195→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   196→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   197→\n   198→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   199→      await sendMessage(\n   200→        message.chat.id,\n   201→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   202→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   203→      );\n   204→      return;\n   205→    }\n   206→\n   207→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   208→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   209→      .prepare(\n   210→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   211→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   212→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   213→         AND author_id = ?\n   214→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   215→      )\n   216→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   217→\n   218→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   219→      await sendMessage(\n   220→        message.chat.id,\n   221→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   222→      );\n   223→      return;\n   224→    }\n   225→\n   226→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   227→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   228→      return;\n   229→    }\n   230→\n   231→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   232→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   233→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   234→    await sendMessage(\n   235→      message.chat.id,\n   236→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   237→    );\n   238→    return;\n   239→  }\n   240→\n   241→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   242→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   243→  if (linkMatch) {\n   244→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   245→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   246→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   247→      return;\n   248→    }\n   249→\n   250→    const linkedUser = db\n   251→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   252→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   253→\n   254→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   255→      await sendMessage(\n   256→        message.chat.id,\n   257→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   258→      );\n   259→      return;\n   260→    }\n   261→\n   262→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   263→\n   264→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   265→    const listing = db\n   266→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   267→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   268→\n   269→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   270→      await sendMessage(\n   271→        message.chat.id,\n   272→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   273→      );\n   274→      return;\n   275→    }\n   276→\n   277→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   278→      await sendMessage(\n   279→        message.chat.id,\n   280→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   281→      );\n   282→      return;\n   283→    }\n   284→\n   285→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   286→  }\n   287→}\n   288→\n   289→/**\n   290→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   291→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   292→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   293→ * 3. Notify all members\n   294→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   295→ */\n   296→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   297→  const listing = db\n   298→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   299→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   300→\n   301→  if (!listing) {\n   302→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   303→    return;\n   304→  }\n   305→\n   306→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   307→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   308→    return;\n   309→  }\n   310→\n   311→  // Try to create an invite link\n   312→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   313→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   314→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   315→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   316→  }\n   317→\n   318→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   319→    await sendMessage(\n   320→      chatId,\n   321→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   322→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   323→    );\n   324→    return;\n   325→  }\n   326→\n   327→  // Save to database\n   328→  db.prepare(\n   329→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   330→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   331→\n   332→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   333→  const members = db\n   334→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   335→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   336→\n   337→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   338→  for (const member of members) {\n   339→    createNotification(\n   340→      member.user_id,\n   341→      listingId,\n   342→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   343→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   344→    );\n   345→  }\n   346→\n   347→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   348→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   349→  await sendMessage(\n   350→    chatId,\n   351→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   352→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   353→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   354→  );\n   355→}\n   356→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"189a2f97-7b8a-4ff0-a681-519e2b1f61c9","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:45.381Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Bv9n8am9ntJshSLKFMgo4X","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"79c30f29-0b95-4008-84ba-cbd6b131c880","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:45.625Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Gj4d4xKMyKkKhB638YgAcW","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"46a2cf10-dde0-48ca-8b74-4ff8117176d6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:48.119Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XEQYGy6jS1ejAWLHtH8erX","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01WRMztf6id6gwCgWoHmkDFx","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7312,"cache_read_input_tokens":26300,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7312,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"b7bc005b-5df7-4601-b957-49119962170c"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WRMztf6id6gwCgWoHmkDFx","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    46→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n    47→      return NextResponse.json(\n    48→        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n    49→        { status: 400 }\n    50→      );\n    51→    }\n    52→\n    53→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    54→      return NextResponse.json(\n    55→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    56→        { status: 400 }\n    57→      );\n    58→    }\n    59→\n    60→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    61→      return NextResponse.json(\n    62→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    63→        { status: 400 }\n    64→      );\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    68→    if (startDate < today) {\n    69→      return NextResponse.json(\n    70→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    71→        { status: 400 }\n    72→      );\n    73→    }\n    74→\n    75→    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    76→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    77→      return NextResponse.json(\n    78→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    79→        { status: 400 }\n    80→      );\n    81→    }\n    82→\n    83→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n    84→      ? platformPreference\n    85→      : \"telegram\";\n    86→\n    87→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n    88→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n    89→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n    90→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n    91→        ? bookCoverUrl\n    92→        : \"\";\n    93→\n    94→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n    95→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    96→      const result = db\n    97→        .prepare(\n    98→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n    99→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   100→        )\n   101→        .run(\n   102→          session.userId,\n   103→          bookTitle.trim(),\n   104→          bookAuthor.trim(),\n   105→          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n   106→          bookOlid || \"\",\n   107→          language || \"English\",\n   108→          readingPace.trim(),\n   109→          startDate,\n   110→          meetingFormat,\n   111→          size,\n   112→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   113→          platform\n   114→        );\n   115→\n   116→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   117→      db.prepare(\n   118→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   119→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   120→\n   121→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   122→    });\n   123→\n   124→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   125→\n   126→    return NextResponse.json(\n   127→      { id: listingId },\n   128→      { status: 201 }\n   129→    );\n   130→  } catch (error) {\n   131→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   132→    return NextResponse.json(\n   133→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   134→      { status: 500 }\n   135→    );\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"83774cc8-0e83-4b86-beb9-141342d61773","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:48.416Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BJEoHgBh459LxqxyPU5YDa","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    73→  const listing = db\n    74→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→  if (!listing) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    80→      { status: 404 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    87→      { status: 400 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  // Verify both users are members\n    92→  const raterMember = db\n    93→    .prepare(\n    94→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    95→    )\n    96→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    97→\n    98→  if (!raterMember) {\n    99→    return NextResponse.json(\n   100→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   101→      { status: 403 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  const ratedMember = db\n   106→    .prepare(\n   107→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   108→    )\n   109→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   110→\n   111→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   112→    return NextResponse.json(\n   113→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   114→      { status: 400 }\n   115→    );\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   119→  const existing = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (existing) {\n   126→    db.prepare(\n   127→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   128→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   129→  } else {\n   130→    db.prepare(\n   131→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   132→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   133→\n   134→    // Notify the rated user\n   135→    createNotification(\n   136→      ratedUserId,\n   137→      listingId,\n   138→      \"rating_received\",\n   139→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   140→    );\n   141→  }\n   142→\n   143→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→}\n   145→\n   146→/**\n   147→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   148→ *\n   149→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   150→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   151→ */\n   152→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   153→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   154→  if (!session) {\n   155→    return NextResponse.json(\n   156→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   157→      { status: 401 }\n   158→    );\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   162→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   163→    return NextResponse.json(\n   164→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   165→      { status: 400 }\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   169→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→\n   176→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   177→  const isMember = db\n   178→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   179→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   180→  if (!isMember) {\n   181→    return NextResponse.json(\n   182→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   183→      { status: 403 }\n   184→    );\n   185→  }\n   186→\n   187→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   188→  const givenRatings = db\n   189→    .prepare(\n   190→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   191→       FROM ratings r\n   192→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   193→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   194→    )\n   195→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   196→      rated_user_id: number;\n   197→      score: number;\n   198→      comment: string;\n   199→      display_name: string;\n   200→    }[];\n   201→\n   202→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   203→  const receivedRatings = db\n   204→    .prepare(\n   205→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   206→       FROM ratings r\n   207→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   208→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   209→    )\n   210→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   211→      rater_id: number;\n   212→      score: number;\n   213→      comment: string;\n   214→      display_name: string;\n   215→    }[];\n   216→\n   217→  return NextResponse.json({\n   218→    givenRatings,\n   219→    receivedRatings,\n   220→  });\n   221→}\n   222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"d177f24d-ec48-46de-a34d-067309ae4a2c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:48.721Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LPXWUZXmn3N9h4xnyb44qt","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"63e915c2-6ed7-445a-941e-306e3074f523","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:51.144Z"}

WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    62→    discordLink.trim(),\n    63→    listingId\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"b86b89e5-a8b4-4348-b5c2-1eaa5b1d837c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:52.000Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011F51CmvUgtuhUkPkTRdzkE","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"95f2e040-f943-46c9-ba59-861aef2035db","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:54.240Z"}
