{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01HRcLKgja47ZtcEeK5E7HsA","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_017mG3dxQ3Bq6Zi5ajZqvKxh","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2186,"cache_read_input_tokens":39077,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2186,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"b1a1eb56-0e3b-437f-961b-b44e543d0a53"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017mG3dxQ3Bq6Zi5ajZqvKxh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n    22→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    23→  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n    24→\n    25→  if (!includePast) {\n    26→    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    27→    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    28→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    29→    params.push(effectiveDate);\n    30→  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    31→    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    37→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    38→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    42→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    43→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    47→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    48→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    52→\n    53→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    54→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    55→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    56→\n    57→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    58→\n    59→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    60→  const countResult = db\n    61→    .prepare(\n    62→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    63→    )\n    64→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    65→\n    66→  const listings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT\n    69→        l.*,\n    70→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    71→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    72→      FROM listings l\n    73→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    74→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    75→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    76→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    77→    )\n    78→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    79→\n    80→  return NextResponse.json({\n    81→    listings,\n    82→    pagination: {\n    83→      page,\n    84→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    85→      total: countResult.total,\n    86→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    87→    },\n    88→  });\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"3b0d4b97-4314-4f52-a68a-b4829021b829","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:54.594Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01HRcLKgja47ZtcEeK5E7HsA","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KY1D6AKBsXYPFWkz9zrnvN","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2186,"cache_read_input_tokens":39077,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2186,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"174c5868-9447-4540-9d24-0f6a1c3833c7"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KY1D6AKBsXYPFWkz9zrnvN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"60e4256a-847b-4e6a-bf6b-49986d7c4ff9","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:54.873Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01U2iKUhaedvU4bD2ejiEk2D","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"03a780b1-791c-42ed-8c20-053f24729696","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:58.207Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PwT7GztawooaUS5mmGMbf6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json(\n    13→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    14→      { status: 401 }\n    15→    );\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const listing = db\n    32→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    33→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json(\n    41→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n    42→      { status: 403 }\n    43→    );\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    49→      { status: 400 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    61→\n    62→  return NextResponse.json({\n    63→    inviteUrl,\n    64→    instructions:\n    65→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n    66→      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n    67→  });\n    68→}\n    69→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"92ffa4d1-de4a-4f47-99fa-dccd71be4b79","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:58.643Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a72a243d78b6626fe","tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","description":"Reading app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":45890,"tool_uses":26,"duration_ms":27307},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"1d181554-8685-48df-8cd1-c00172a291b9","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_014wLeZYsr3EsF1vPjQp3Nj1","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HsFqLLVLoNLvuCsVkyo5T7","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3759,"cache_read_input_tokens":41263,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3759,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"bd6f3126-384e-49c9-8292-e7518e643c6e"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HsFqLLVLoNLvuCsVkyo5T7","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→  isValidSnowflake,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→\n    11→/**\n    12→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    13→ *\n    14→ * This endpoint handles:\n    15→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    16→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    17→ *\n    18→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    19→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    20→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    21→ */\n    22→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    23→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    24→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    25→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    27→  }\n    28→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    29→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  try {\n    34→    const body = await req.json();\n    35→    const { type } = body;\n    36→\n    37→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    38→      return handleLink(body);\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    42→    if (type === 1) {\n    43→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    44→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    45→    }\n    46→\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    50→    return NextResponse.json(\n    51→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    52→      { status: 500 }\n    53→    );\n    54→  }\n    55→}\n    56→\n    57→async function handleLink(body: {\n    58→  guildId: string;\n    59→  listingId: number;\n    60→  channelId?: string;\n    61→}) {\n    62→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    63→\n    64→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    67→      { status: 400 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→\n    71→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    72→    return NextResponse.json(\n    73→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    74→      { status: 400 }\n    75→    );\n    76→  }\n    77→\n    78→  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n    79→  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    80→    return NextResponse.json(\n    81→      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n    82→      { status: 400 }\n    83→    );\n    84→  }\n    85→  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    86→    return NextResponse.json(\n    87→      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n    88→      { status: 400 }\n    89→    );\n    90→  }\n    91→\n    92→  const listing = db\n    93→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    94→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    95→\n    96→  if (!listing) {\n    97→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    98→  }\n    99→\n   100→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n   101→    return NextResponse.json(\n   102→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n   103→      { status: 400 }\n   104→    );\n   105→  }\n   106→\n   107→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n   108→    return NextResponse.json(\n   109→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n   110→      { status: 400 }\n   111→    );\n   112→  }\n   113→\n   114→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n   115→\n   116→  // If no channel specified, create one\n   117→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n   118→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n   119→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n   120→      .toLowerCase()\n   121→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   122→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   123→\n   124→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   125→      guildId,\n   126→      channelName,\n   127→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   128→    );\n   129→\n   130→    if (!channel) {\n   131→      return NextResponse.json(\n   132→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   133→        { status: 500 }\n   134→      );\n   135→    }\n   136→\n   137→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  // Create invite link\n   141→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   142→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   145→      { status: 500 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  }\n   148→\n   149→  // Save to DB\n   150→  db.prepare(\n   151→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   152→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   153→\n   154→  // Notify all members\n   155→  const members = db\n   156→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   157→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   158→\n   159→  for (const member of members) {\n   160→    createNotification(\n   161→      member.user_id,\n   162→      listingId,\n   163→      \"discord_ready\",\n   164→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   165→    );\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   169→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   170→    targetChannelId,\n   171→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   172→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   173→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   174→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   175→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   176→  );\n   177→\n   178→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   179→}\n   180→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"d2a91485-350d-4b68-a328-e547abeb9776","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:01:58.737Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a72a243d78b6626fe","tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","description":"Reading app/lib/discord.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":50104,"tool_uses":27,"duration_ms":29535},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"da348911-1a80-49a1-8165-bc124a953aac","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01JknmxKJBdUrMonnL6fDD35","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014L3k3v31TYSPPEmMRXGiLg","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4180,"cache_read_input_tokens":45022,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4180,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"4add914b-0cbc-46d5-8676-0cdc9c0c8ef9"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014L3k3v31TYSPPEmMRXGiLg","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n     6→ * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n     7→ * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n    11→ * - Author adds bot to their server\n    12→ * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n    13→ * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n    18→const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n    19→\n    20→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    21→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→/**\n    25→ * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n    26→ * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n    27→ */\n    28→export function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n    29→  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n    30→}\n    31→\n    32→/**\n    33→ * Call the Discord REST API.\n    34→ */\n    35→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    36→  endpoint: string,\n    37→  method: string = \"GET\",\n    38→  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n    39→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n    40→  try {\n    41→    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n    42→      method,\n    43→      headers: {\n    44→        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n    45→        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n    46→      },\n    47→      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    48→    });\n    49→\n    50→    if (!res.ok) {\n    51→      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    52→      return {\n    53→        ok: false,\n    54→        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n    55→      };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    59→    return { ok: true, data };\n    60→  } catch (err) {\n    61→    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n    62→  }\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * Get bot user info.\n    67→ */\n    68→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    69→  id: string;\n    70→  username: string;\n    71→} | null> {\n    72→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n    73→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→/**\n    77→ * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n    78→ * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n    79→ *\n    80→ * Permission bits:\n    81→ * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n    82→ * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n    83→ * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n    84→ * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n    85→ * Total: 3089\n    86→ */\n    87→export function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n    88→  const permissions = 3089;\n    89→  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n    90→  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n    91→}\n    92→\n    93→/**\n    94→ * Create a text channel in a guild.\n    95→ */\n    96→export async function createTextChannel(\n    97→  guildId: string,\n    98→  name: string,\n    99→  topic?: string\n   100→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   101→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   102→    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n   103→    \"POST\",\n   104→    {\n   105→      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n   106→      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n   107→      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n   108→    }\n   109→  );\n   110→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→/**\n   114→ * Create an invite for a channel.\n   115→ */\n   116→export async function createChannelInvite(\n   117→  channelId: string,\n   118→  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n   119→): Promise<string | null> {\n   120→  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n   121→    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n   122→    \"POST\",\n   123→    {\n   124→      max_age: maxAge,\n   125→      max_uses: 0,\n   126→      unique: true,\n   127→    }\n   128→  );\n   129→  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n   130→    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n   131→  }\n   132→  return null;\n   133→}\n   134→\n   135→/**\n   136→ * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n   137→ */\n   138→export async function sendChannelMessage(\n   139→  channelId: string,\n   140→  content: string\n   141→): Promise<boolean> {\n   142→  const res = await callApi(\n   143→    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n   144→    \"POST\",\n   145→    { content }\n   146→  );\n   147→  return res.ok;\n   148→}\n   149→\n   150→/**\n   151→ * Get guild (server) info.\n   152→ */\n   153→export async function getGuild(\n   154→  guildId: string\n   155→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   156→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   157→    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n   158→  );\n   159→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   160→}\n   161→\n   162→/**\n   163→ * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n   164→ */\n   165→export async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n   166→  { id: string; name: string }[]\n   167→> {\n   168→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n   169→    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n   170→  );\n   171→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n   172→}\n   173→\n   174→/**\n   175→ * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n   176→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   177→ */\n   178→export function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n   179→  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   180→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   181→}\n   182→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"83daeae7-4507-4b36-841a-92398cd648d4","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:00.967Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01JknmxKJBdUrMonnL6fDD35","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01B6RTyZNcefmoetSobXcUmM","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/email.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4180,"cache_read_input_tokens":45022,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4180,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"7cdfcb29-680e-425e-931c-555283413101"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01B6RTyZNcefmoetSobXcUmM","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"2f2c6f73-3730-44b4-85ee-29aed7e96b47","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:01.354Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DS4C6joNZ89sqmVn9Tcjiu","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     6→ *\n     7→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     8→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n     9→ *\n    10→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    11→ */\n    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    14→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    17→      { status: 500 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const body = await req.json();\n    22→  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    29→      { status: 500 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    34→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    37→      { status: 500 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    42→  if (!bot) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    45→      { status: 500 }\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    50→  if (!success) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({\n    58→    ok: true,\n    59→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    60→    webhookUrl,\n    61→  });\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    68→ */\n    69→export async function GET() {\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({\n    71→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    72→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    73→  });\n    74→}\n    75→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"2ec119f0-6fb5-402c-9038-199c2be818f0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:05.372Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016s5FD5BT8CktBjVSrypWx5","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     6→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n     9→ */\n    10→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    11→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    12→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    13→\n    14→  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    17→      { status: 403 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json(\n    23→      {\n    24→        error:\n    25→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    26→      },\n    27→      { status: 503 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    32→  if (!botInfo) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json(\n    34→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    35→      { status: 500 }\n    36→    );\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  return NextResponse.json({\n    40→    ok: true,\n    41→    bot: {\n    42→      id: botInfo.id,\n    43→      username: botInfo.username,\n    44→    },\n    45→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    46→  });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"90baaf85-b16d-4a26-83e6-8692c5f2a56f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:05.439Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0143yeFVYgPsXyRvetPGrWqt","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  discord_link: string;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  max_group_size: number;\n    18→  author_name: string;\n    19→  joined_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export async function GET() {\n    23→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    24→  if (!session) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    29→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    30→    SELECT\n    31→      l.id,\n    32→      l.book_title,\n    33→      l.book_author,\n    34→      l.book_cover_url,\n    35→      l.reading_pace,\n    36→      l.start_date,\n    37→      l.meeting_format,\n    38→      l.is_full,\n    39→      l.telegram_link,\n    40→      l.discord_link,\n    41→      l.max_group_size,\n    42→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    43→      lm.joined_at,\n    44→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    45→    FROM listing_members lm\n    46→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    47→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    48→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    49→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    50→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    51→\n    52→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    53→\n    54→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    55→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    56→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    57→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    58→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    59→\n    60→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    61→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    62→  const active = readings.filter(\n    63→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({\n    67→    active,\n    68→    history,\n    69→    upcoming,\n    70→    total: readings.length,\n    71→  });\n    72→}\n    73→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"7f7a6221-0c03-4f11-8f46-007cddb75095","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:08.164Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BhzW9dj3iKeDcThjAgjCfk","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     5→\n     6→interface BookResult {\n     7→  key: string;\n     8→  title: string;\n     9→  author_name?: string[];\n    10→  cover_i?: number;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Props {\n    14→  onSelect: (book: {\n    15→    title: string;\n    16→    author: string;\n    17→    coverUrl: string;\n    18→    olid: string;\n    19→  }) => void;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    23→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    24→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    27→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    28→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    29→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    30→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    31→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    32→\n    33→  useEffect(() => {\n    34→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    35→      if (\n    36→        containerRef.current &&\n    37→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    38→      ) {\n    39→        setOpen(false);\n    40→      }\n    41→    };\n    42→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    43→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    44→  }, []);\n    45→\n    46→  useEffect(() => {\n    47→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    48→      setResults([]);\n    49→      return;\n    50→    }\n    51→\n    52→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    53→    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    54→\n    55→    const controller = new AbortController();\n    56→    abortRef.current = controller;\n    57→\n    58→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    59→      setLoading(true);\n    60→      try {\n    61→        const res = await fetch(\n    62→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n    63→          { signal: controller.signal }\n    64→        );\n    65→        const data = await res.json();\n    66→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    67→        setOpen(true);\n    68→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n    69→      } catch (err) {\n    70→        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n    71→          setResults([]);\n    72→        }\n    73→      } finally {\n    74→        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n    75→          setLoading(false);\n    76→        }\n    77→      }\n    78→    }, 400);\n    79→\n    80→    return () => {\n    81→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    82→      controller.abort();\n    83→    };\n    84→  }, [query]);\n    85→\n    86→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    87→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    88→    onSelect({\n    89→      title: book.title,\n    90→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    91→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    92→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    93→        : \"\",\n    94→      olid,\n    95→    });\n    96→    setQuery(book.title);\n    97→    setOpen(false);\n    98→    setActiveIndex(-1);\n    99→  };\n   100→\n   101→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n   102→    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n   103→\n   104→    switch (e.key) {\n   105→      case \"ArrowDown\":\n   106→        e.preventDefault();\n   107→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n   108→        break;\n   109→      case \"ArrowUp\":\n   110→        e.preventDefault();\n   111→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n   112→        break;\n   113→      case \"Enter\":\n   114→        e.preventDefault();\n   115→        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n   116→          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n   117→        }\n   118→        break;\n   119→      case \"Escape\":\n   120→        setOpen(false);\n   121→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n   122→        break;\n   123→    }\n   124→  };\n   125→\n   126→  // Scroll active option into view\n   127→  useEffect(() => {\n   128→    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n   129→      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n   130→      if (activeEl) {\n   131→        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n   132→      }\n   133→    }\n   134→  }, [activeIndex]);\n   135→\n   136→  const activeDescendant =\n   137→    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n   138→      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n   139→      : undefined;\n   140→\n   141→  return (\n   142→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n   143→      <input\n   144→        type=\"text\"\n   145→        className=\"input-field\"\n   146→        value={query}\n   147→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n   148→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n   149→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n   150→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n   151→        role=\"combobox\"\n   152→        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n   153→        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n   154→        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   155→        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n   156→        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n   157→        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n   158→      />\n   159→      {loading && (\n   160→        <div\n   161→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n   162→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   163→          role=\"status\"\n   164→          aria-live=\"polite\"\n   165→        >\n   166→          Searching...\n   167→        </div>\n   168→      )}\n   169→\n   170→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   171→        <div\n   172→          ref={listboxRef}\n   173→          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   174→          role=\"listbox\"\n   175→          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n   176→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   177→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   178→        >\n   179→          {results.map((book, index) => (\n   180→            <button\n   181→              key={book.key}\n   182→              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n   183→              type=\"button\"\n   184→              role=\"option\"\n   185→              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n   186→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   187→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   188→              style={{\n   189→                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n   190→              }}\n   191→            >\n   192→              {book.cover_i ? (\n   193→                <Image\n   194→                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n   195→                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n   196→                  width={32}\n   197→                  height={48}\n   198→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n   199→                />\n   200→              ) : (\n   201→                <div\n   202→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n   203→                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n   204→                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   205→                >\n   206→                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n   207→                </div>\n   208→              )}\n   209→              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n   210→                <div\n   211→                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n   212→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   213→                >\n   214→                  {book.title}\n   215→                </div>\n   216→                <div\n   217→                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n   218→                  style={{\n   219→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   220→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   221→                  }}\n   222→                >\n   223→                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n   224→                </div>\n   225→              </div>\n   226→            </button>\n   227→          ))}\n   228→        </div>\n   229→      )}\n   230→    </div>\n   231→  );\n   232→}\n   233→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"de185c39-14e8-4846-bba7-812e79f23876","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:10.331Z"}

handleClickOutside);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  // Close mobile menu on route change\n    48→  useEffect(() => {\n    49→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    50→    setMenuOpen(false);\n >\n    70→      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 h-14 sm:h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n    71→        <Link\n    72→          href=\"/\"\n    73→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01A2pqFfUDxZ9pFCyr4h7bvj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    await session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n    24→  const unread = db\n    25→    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    user: {\n    30→      id: user.id,\n    31→      email: user.email,\n    32→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    33→      bio: user.bio,\n    34→      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    35→    },\n    36→  });\n    37→}\n    38→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"a50e1a25-b1f3-4618-8dba-9c8e756bb1d2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:13.281Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015o7Av76g4t5bKFQztvUZtP","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"80561adb-1824-42d7-8160-34e77e02fcd1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:14.150Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Te7mTNSDUjqgbDzWDxZ55G","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const startTime = Date.now();\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET() {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    // Check database connectivity\n    10→    const dbCheck = db.prepare(\"SELECT 1 AS ok\").get() as { ok: number } | undefined;\n    11→    const dbOk = dbCheck?.ok === 1;\n    12→\n    13→    const response: Record<string, unknown> = {\n    14→      status: \"healthy\",\n    15→      uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    16→      database: dbOk ? \"connected\" : \"error\",\n    17→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    18→    };\n    19→\n    20→    // Only expose detailed stats to authenticated users\n    21→    try {\n    22→      const session = await getSession();\n    23→      if (session?.userId) {\n    24→        const stats = db.prepare(`\n    25→          SELECT\n    26→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users,\n    27→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings) AS listings,\n    28→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings WHERE is_full = 0) AS open_listings\n    29→        `).get() as { users: number; listings: number; open_listings: number };\n    30→\n    31→        response.stats = {\n    32→          users: stats.users,\n    33→          listings: stats.listings,\n    34→          openListings: stats.open_listings,\n    35→        };\n    36→      }\n    37→    } catch {\n    38→      // Session check failed (e.g., no cookies context) — skip stats\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    return NextResponse.json(response);\n    42→  } catch (error) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      {\n    45→        status: \"unhealthy\",\n    46→        uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    47→        database: \"error\",\n    48→        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n    49→        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    50→      },\n    51→      { status: 503 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"ab7eb481-2a3b-4b86-b2bf-4231769df8bd","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:14.151Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NWUYafSVYtQU5HTTDzY7BJ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\n     2→import { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n     3→\n     4→const testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n     5→  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n     6→  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n     7→  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n     8→  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n     9→  db.exec(`\n    10→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    11→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    12→      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    13→      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    14→      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    15→      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    16→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    17→    );\n    18→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    19→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    20→      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    21→      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    22→      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    23→      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    24→      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    25→      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    26→      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    27→      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    28→      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    29→      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    30→      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    31→      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    32→      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    33→      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n    34→      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    35→      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n    37→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    38→      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    39→    );\n    40→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    41→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    42→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    43→      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    44→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    45→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    46→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    47→    );\n    48→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    49→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    50→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→      listing_id INTEGER,\n    52→      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    53→      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    54→      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    55→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    56→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    57→    );\n    58→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n    59→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    60→      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    61→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    62→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id)\n    63→    );\n    64→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n    65→      chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n    66→      chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    67→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    68→    );\n    69→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n    70→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    71→      telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    72→      PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n    73→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    74→    );\n    75→  `);\n    76→  return db;\n    77→});\n    78→\n    79→const mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n    80→  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n    81→  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n    82→  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n    83→  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    84→    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    85→    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n    86→  }),\n    87→  escapeHtml: vi.fn().mockImplementation((text: string) =>\n    88→    text.replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\").replace(/</g, \"&lt;\").replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\").replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    89→  ),\n    90→}));\n    91→\n    92→vi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n    93→\n    94→vi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n    95→\n    96→vi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n    97→  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n    98→}));\n    99→\n   100→const { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/telegram/webhook/route\");\n   101→\n   102→function insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n   103→  testDb\n   104→    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n   105→    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n   106→  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n   107→}\n   108→\n   109→function insertListing(\n   110→  authorId: number,\n   111→  overrides: Partial<{\n   112→    is_full: number;\n   113→    telegram_link: string;\n   114→    book_title: string;\n   115→  }> = {}\n   116→) {\n   117→  testDb\n   118→    .prepare(\n   119→      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n   120→       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n   121→    )\n   122→    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n   123→  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n   124→}\n   125→\n   126→function addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n   127→  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n   128→}\n   129→\n   130→describe(\"POST /api/telegram/webhook\", () => {\n   131→  beforeEach(() => {\n   132→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n   133→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n   134→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups\");\n   135→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_chats\");\n   136→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_user_links\");\n   137→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n   138→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n   139→    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"webhook-secret\");\n   140→    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n   141→    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n   142→    mockTelegram.sendMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n   143→  });\n   144→\n   145→  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n   146→    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n   147→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   148→      method: \"POST\",\n   149→      body: {},\n   150→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"anything\" },\n   151→    });\n   152→    const res = await POST(req);\n   153→    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n   154→    expect(status).toBe(500);\n   155→  });\n   156→\n   157→  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n   158→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   159→      method: \"POST\",\n   160→      body: {},\n   161→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"wrong-secret\" },\n   162→    });\n   163→    const res = await POST(req);\n   164→    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n   165→    expect(status).toBe(403);\n   166→  });\n   167→\n   168→  it(\"returns 200 for empty update (no action)\", async () => {\n   169→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   170→      method: \"POST\",\n   171→      body: { update_id: 1 },\n   172→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n   173→    });\n   174→    const res = await POST(req);\n   175→    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n   176→    expect(status).toBe(200);\n   177→    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n   178→  });\n   179→\n   180→  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload when sender is linked author\", async () => {\n   181→    const userId = insertUser();\n   182→    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n   183→    addMember(listingId, userId);\n   184→    // Link the telegram user to the listing author\n   185→    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n   186→\n   187→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   188→      method: \"POST\",\n   189→      body: {\n   190→        update_id: 2,\n   191→        message: {\n   192→          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n   193→          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n   194→          from: { id: 456 },\n   195→        },\n   196→      },\n   197→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n   198→    });\n   199→\n   200→    const res = await {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Rp8fapJPjvvXyeZxG7hnqd","type":"tool_result","content":"41:  if (listing.is_full) {\n42:    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n43:  }\n44:\n45:  // Check if already a member\n46:  const existing = db\n47:    .prepare(\n48:      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n49:    )\n50:    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n51:\n52:  if (existing) {\n53:    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n54:  }\n55:\n56:  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n57:  const pendingApp = db\n58:    .prepare(\n59:      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n60:    )\n61:    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n62:\n63:  if (pendingApp) {\n64:    return NextResponse.json(\n65:      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n66:      { status: 400 }\n67:    );\n68:  }\n69:\n70:  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n71:  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n72:    const { count } = db\n73:      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n74:      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n75:\n76:    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n77:      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"7ddec6f1-5c9f-47e8-b473-cd85a3443c33","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:36.709Z"}

(platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   204→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n   237→        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n   238→      }\n   239→    }\n   240→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   241→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   242→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   243→    }\n   244→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   245→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   246→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   247→    }\n   248→\n   249→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   250→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   251→    }\n   252→\n   253→    values.push(listingId);\n   254→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   255→\n   256→    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)\n   257→    try {\n   258→      const members = db"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01GYEEvaqQn5eSjKeTTMbG4A","session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"f97b19c5-1298-47e1-9ddb-cf0d5ecfec7b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:02:51.548Z"}
