{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01U1MEp1SnnwJNUVZXSsakSj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    77→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    78→    pendingApplicants = db\n    79→      .prepare(\n    80→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    81→         FROM listing_applications la\n    82→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    83→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    84→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    85→      )\n    86→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    87→  }\n    88→\n    89→  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data\n    90→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    91→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients\n    92→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    93→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    94→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    95→  }\n    96→\n    97→  return NextResponse.json({\n    98→    listing: {\n    99→      ...safeListingData,\n   100→      members,\n   101→      memberCount: members.length,\n   102→      isMember,\n   103→      isAuthor,\n   104→      hasApplied,\n   105→      applicationStatus,\n   106→      pendingApplicants,\n   107→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   108→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   109→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   110→    },\n   111→  });\n   112→}\n   113→\n   114→export async function PATCH(\n   115→  req: NextRequest,\n   116→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   117→) {\n   118→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   119→  if (!session) {\n   120→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   121→  }\n   122→\n   123→  const { id } = await params;\n   124→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   125→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   126→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   127→  }\n   128→\n   129→  const listing = db\n   130→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   131→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   132→\n   133→  if (!listing) {\n   134→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   135→  }\n   136→\n   137→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   138→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   142→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   145→      { status: 400 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  }\n   148→\n   149→  try {\n   150→    const body = await req.json();\n   151→    const {\n   152→      language,\n   153→      readingPace,\n   154→      startDate,\n   155→      meetingFormat,\n   156→      maxGroupSize,\n   157→      requiresApproval,\n   158→      platformPreference,\n   159→    } = body;\n   160→\n   161→    // Validate fields that are provided\n   162→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   163→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   164→    }\n   165→\n   166→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   167→      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   168→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   169→      }\n   170→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   171→      if (startDate < today) {\n   172→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   173→      }\n   174→    }\n   175→\n   176→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n   177→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   178→    }\n   179→\n   180→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   181→      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   182→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   183→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   184→      }\n   185→\n   186→      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n   187→      const memberCount = (db\n   188→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   189→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   190→\n   191→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   192→        return NextResponse.json(\n   193→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   194→          { status: 400 }\n   195→        );\n   196→      }\n   197→    }\n   198→\n   199→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   200→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   201→    }\n   202→\n   203→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   204→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   205→    }\n   206→\n   207→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   208→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   209→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   210→\n   211→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   212→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   213→      values.push(language);\n   214→    }\n   215→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   216→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   217→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   218→    }\n   219→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   220→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   221→      values.push(startDate);\n   222→    }\n   223→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   224→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   225→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   226→    }\n   227→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   228→      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   229→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   230→      values.push(newSize);\n   231→\n   232→      // Atomically set is_full based on actual member count at update time\n   233→      // This avoids a race condition where a concurrent join could fill the group\n   234→      // between our COUNT(*) read and the UPDATE write.\n   235→      if (listing.is_full) {\n   236→        updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n   237→        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n   238→      }\n   239→    }\n   240→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   241→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   242→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   243→    }\n   244→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   245→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   246→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   247→    }\n   248→\n   249→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   250→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   251→    }\n   252→\n   253→    values.push(listingId);\n   254→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   255→\n   256→    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)\n   257→    try {\n   258→      const members = db\n   259→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   260→        .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   261→\n   262→      if (members.length > 0) {\n   263→        const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   264→        for (const member of members) {\n   265→          createNotification(\n   266→            member.user_id,\n   267→            listingId,\n   268→            \"listing_updated\",\n   269→            `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" has been updated by the organizer.`\n   270→          );\n   271→        }\n   272→      }\n   273→    } catch (notifErr) {\n   274→      console.error(\"Notification error (update succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   275→    }\n   276→\n   277→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   278→  } catch (error) {\n   279→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   280→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   281→  }\n   282→}\n   283→\n   284→export async function DELETE(\n   285→  _req: NextRequest,\n   286→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   287→) {\n   288→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   289→  if (!session) {\n   290→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   291→  }\n   292→\n   293→  const { id } = await params;\n   294→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   295→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   296→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   297→  }\n   298→\n   299→  const listing = db\n   300→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   301→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   302→\n   303→  if (!listing) {\n   304→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   305→  }\n   306→\n   307→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   308→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   309→  }\n   310→\n   311→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   312→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   313→    return NextResponse.json(\n   314→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   315→      { status: 400 }\n   316→    );\n   317→  }\n   318→\n   319→  try {\n   320→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   321→    const members = db\n   322→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   323→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   324→\n   325→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   326→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   327→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   328→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   329→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   330→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   331→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   332→    });\n   333→\n   334→    deleteTransaction();\n   335→\n   336→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   337→    for (const member of members) {\n   338→      try {\n   339→        createNotification(\n   340→          member.user_id,\n   341→          null,\n   342→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   343→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   344→        );\n   345→      } catch {\n   346→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   347→      }\n   348→    }\n   349→\n   350→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   351→  } catch (error) {\n   352→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   353→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   354→  }\n 356→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"6b5b746d-f57b-4da3-89d6-5b781f665578","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:04:09.568Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // Atomically set is_full based on actual member count at update time\n      // This avoids a race condition where a concurrent join could fill the group\n      // between our COUNT(*) read and the UPDATE write.\n      if (listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)\n    try {\n      const members = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n        .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n      if (members.length > 0) {\n        const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n        for (const member of members) {\n          createNotification(\n            member.user_id,\n            listingId,\n            \"listing_updated\",\n            `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" has been updated by the organizer.`\n          );\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (notifErr) {\n      console.error(\"Notification error (update succeeded):\", notifErr);\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":356,"startLine":1,"totalLines":356}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YDjyJRP9oAZQ4iq2bcmJjv","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    72→    const { count } = db\n    73→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    74→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    75→\n    76→    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    77→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    78→    }\n    79→\n    80→    db.prepare(\n    81→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    82→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    83→\n    84→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    85→    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    86→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n    90→  });\n    91→\n    92→  const result = joinTransaction();\n    93→\n    94→  if (result.error) {\n    95→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n    99→  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   100→\n   101→  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n   102→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   106→}\n   107→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"172864c0-33d0-480d-98c9-79f2f44ff032","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:04:09.780Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n  const pendingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (pendingApp) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","numLines":107,"startLine":1,"totalLines":107}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HuRJTTKKTQyxrtws31iFzx","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull, notifyListingAuthor } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    85→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    86→\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\n    89→          .prepare(\n    90→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    91→          )\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n    93→\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n    95→          db.prepare(\n    96→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\n    98→        }\n    99→\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   101→      }\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   103→    });\n   104→\n   105→    try {\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   107→\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   109→      try {\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   111→\n   112→        // Notify the author that a new member has joined (same as direct-join flow)\n   113→        const applicant = db\n   114→          .prepare(\"SELECT display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n   115→          .get(applicantUserId) as { display_name: string } | undefined;\n   116→        if (applicant) {\n   117→          notifyListingAuthor(listingId, applicant.display_name);\n   118→        }\n   119→\n   120→        if (result.isFull) {\n   121→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   122→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   123→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   124→          }\n   125→        }\n   126→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   127→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   128→      }\n   129→\n   130→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   131→    } catch (err) {\n   132→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   133→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   134→    }\n   135→  } else {\n   136→    // Reject\n   137→    db.prepare(\n   138→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   139→    ).run(applicationId);\n   140→\n   141→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   142→\n   143→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→  }\n   145→}\n   146→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"6e92f732-82fc-4dd5-aeb3-0d58f01d827b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:04:10.431Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull, notifyListingAuthor } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        // Notify the author that a new member has joined (same as direct-join flow)\n        const applicant = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(applicantUserId) as { display_name: string } | undefined;\n        if (applicant) {\n          notifyListingAuthor(listingId, applicant.display_name);\n        }\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":146,"startLine":1,"totalLines":146}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TrkKcimtZwJq9LcwWc7gm4","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import db from \"./db\";\n     2→import { sendEmail } from \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    47→    case \"listing_updated\":\n    48→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    49→    case \"telegram_ready\":\n    50→      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    51→    case \"discord_ready\":\n    52→      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    53→    default:\n    54→      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n    55→  }\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→export function notifyListingAuthor(\n    59→  listingId: number,\n    60→  joinerName: string\n    61→) {\n    62→  const listing = db\n    63→    .prepare(\n    64→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    65→    )\n    66→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    67→\n    68→  if (listing) {\n    69→    createNotification(\n    70→      listing.author_id,\n    71→      listingId,\n    72→      \"new_member\",\n    73→      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    74→    );\n    75→  }\n    76→}\n    77→\n    78→export function notifyApplicationReceived(\n    79→  listingId: number,\n    80→  applicantName: string\n    81→) {\n    82→  const listing = db\n    83→    .prepare(\n    84→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    85→    )\n    86→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    87→\n    88→  if (listing) {\n    89→    createNotification(\n    90→      listing.author_id,\n    91→      listingId,\n    92→      \"application_received\",\n    93→      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    94→    );\n    95→  }\n    96→}\n    97→\n    98→export function notifyApplicationDecision(\n    99→  userId: number,\n   100→  listingId: number,\n   101→  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n   102→) {\n   103→  const listing = db\n   104→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   105→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n   106→\n   107→  if (listing) {\n   108→    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n   109→    const message =\n   110→      decision === \"approved\"\n   111→        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n   112→        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n   113→    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n   114→  }\n   115→}\n   116→\n   117→export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n   118→  const listing = db\n   119→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   120→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n   121→  // Include all members (including author) — everyone should know the group is full\n   122→  const members = db\n   123→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   124→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   125→\n   126→  if (listing) {\n   127→    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n   128→    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n   129→      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n   130→      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n   131→    const message = botConfigured\n   132→      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n   133→      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n   134→\n   135→    for (const member of members) {\n   136→      createNotification(\n   137→        member.user_id,\n   138→        listingId,\n   139→        \"group_full\",\n   140→        message\n   141→      );\n   142→    }\n   143→  }\n   144→}\n   145→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"e293ea8f-4767-4f04-ab4d-cfdf9e5be8d1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:04:10.559Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","content":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    case \"telegram_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    case \"discord_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Include all members (including author) — everyone should know the group is full\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","numLines":145,"startLine":1,"totalLines":145}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MQTz4Kn6g1hme6qdRv18W9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"61070bf9-6ea9-4d16-b0d0-46685c6ce800","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:04:10.753Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/email.ts","content":"import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n\nconst isConfigured =\n  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n\nlet transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n\nfunction getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n  if (!transporter) {\n    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n        ? {\n            auth: {\n              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n            },\n          }\n        : {}),\n    });\n  }\n  return transporter;\n}\n\nexport async function sendEmail(\n  to: string,\n  subject: string,\n  text: string,\n  html?: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const t = getTransporter();\n  if (!t) return false;\n\n  try {\n    await t.sendMail({\n      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n      to,\n      subject,\n      text,\n      html: html || text,\n    });\n    return true;\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n  return isConfigured;\n}\n","numLines":57,"startLine":1,"totalLines":57}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Uh2TAU7V1eqduXFsZaRpXz","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     6→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n     9→ */\n    10→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    11→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    12→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    13→\n    14→  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    17→      { status: 403 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json(\n    23→      {\n    24→        error:\n    25→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    26→      },\n    27→      { status: 503 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    32→  if (!botInfo) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json(\n    34→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    35→      { status: 500 }\n    36→    );\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  return NextResponse.json({\n    40→    ok: true,\n    41→    bot: {\n    42→      id: botInfo.id,\n    43→      username: botInfo.username,\n    44→    },\n    45→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    46→  });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"d06bd522-da19-41cc-8f97-ba84b04dea42","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:04:17.762Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/setup/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\n/**\n * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n *\n * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const { secret } = await req.json();\n  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n\n  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!botInfo) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    ok: true,\n    bot: {\n      id: botInfo.id,\n      username: botInfo.username,\n    },\n    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n  });\n}\n","numLines":48,"startLine":1,"totalLines":48}}}

listingId, \"approved\");\n \n+        // Notify the author that a new member has joined (same as direct-join flow)\n+        const applicant = db\n+          .prepare(\"SELECT display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n+          .get(applicantUserId) as { display_name: string } | undefined;\n+        if (applicant) {\n+          notifyListingAuthor(listingId, applicant.display_name);\n+      updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n+        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n       }\n     }\n     if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n@@ -253,6 +253,27 @@ export async function PATCH(\n     values.push(listingId);\n     db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n \n+    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)\n+    try {\n+      const members = db\n+        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n+        .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n+\n+      if (members.length > 0) {\n+        const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n+        for (const member of members) {\n+          createNotification(\n+            member.user_id,\n+            listingId,\n+            \"listing_updated\",\n+            `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" has been updated by the organizer.`\n+          );\n+        }\n+      }\n+    } catch (notifErr) {\n+      console.error(\"Notification error (update succeeded):\", notifErr);\n+    }\n+\n     return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   } catch (error) {\n     console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\ndiff --git a/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts b/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts\nindex 0fe3090..d0752bf 100644\n--- a/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts\n+++ b/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts\n@@ -114,25 +114,9 @@ async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n     return;\n   }\n \n-  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n-  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n-  const pending = db\n-    .prepare(\n-      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n-    )\n-    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n-\n-  if (pending) {\n-    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n-    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n-      chat.id\n-    );\n-    return;\n-  }\n-\n-  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n-  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n-  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n+  // The bot was added to a group. AND user_id != ?\")\n-    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n+    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n+    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n \n   if (listing) {\n     const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YP24KMgSx4iJUVxyaycEAh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    85→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    86→\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\n    89→          .prepare(\n    90→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    91→          )\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n    93→\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n    95→          db.prepare(\n    96→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\n    98→        }\n    99→\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   101→      }\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   103→    });\n   104→\n   105→    try {\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   107→\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   109→      try {\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   111→\n   112→        if (result.isFull) {\n   113→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   114→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   115→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   116→          }\n   117→        }\n   118→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   119→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   120→      }\n   121→\n   122→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   123→    } catch (err) {\n   124→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   125→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   126→    }\n   127→  } else {\n   128→    // Reject\n   129→    db.prepare(\n   130→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   131→    ).run(applicationId);\n   132→\n   133→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   134→\n   135→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"13a11fab-1fff-4be8-b3f0-08c1cc6bab99","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:05:36.469Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":138,"startLine":1,"totalLines":138}}}
