248→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"6576c03a-f7c9-4de0-a345-40371c4ff2e4","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:05:36.862Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n","numLines":100,"startLine":149,"totalLines":335}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KXdURXeUebmeMx3DBUZyvm","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    72→    const { count } = db\n    73→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    74→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    75→\n    76→    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    77→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    78→    }\n    79→\n    80→    db.prepare(\n    81→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    82→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    83→\n    84→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    85→    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    86→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n    90→  });\n    91→\n    92→  const result = joinTransaction();\n    93→\n    94→  if (result.error) {\n    95→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n    99→  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   100→\n   101→  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n   102→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   106→}\n   107→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"2906ee41-ab71-4889-a2b8-082186dcb557","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:05:37.433Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n  const pendingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (pendingApp) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","numLines":107,"startLine":1,"totalLines":107}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_0173H62g5NTeiMMnDi1fqxrE","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018ApJU9b6Ls1Bnu18t1FJDa","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/crypto-utils.ts","content":"import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n\n/**\n * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n */\nexport function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    // Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing\n    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    return false;\n  }\n  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n}\n\n/**\n * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n */\nexport function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":139,"cache_read_input_tokens":71475,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":139},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"cb59a0cf-2fe2-4bf2-a8cf-34e34563f6f0"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01UWFQh2p1S43fAYyDhnfRGj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    16→ *\n    17→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    18→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    19→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    20→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    21→ *\n    22→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    23→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    24→ */\n    25→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    26→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    27→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    28→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    30→  }\n    31→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    32→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    34→  }\n    35→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"1a9e1ab3-c19e-4de8-8af8-bbaf67b3f89b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:01.978Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n","numLines":35,"startLine":1,"totalLines":372}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_015rgYBMwSHXtkwwaQHDb9Fd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015sVahZzpcCWNyUgvNosqvq","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.","new_string":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint."},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":578,"cache_read_input_tokens":72445,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":578},"output_tokens":57,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"4a9034e7-08a6-4e53-8fa5-645248dec394"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015sVahZzpcCWNyUgvNosqvq","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"e94d5e21-04df-4007-972d-4330bca7c051","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:06.226Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.","newString":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n      if (!telegramUserId) {\n        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const linkedUser = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (linkedUser) {\n        const listing = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n\n        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n          return;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":8,"oldLines":6,"newStart":8,"newLines":7,"lines":["   escapeHtml,"," } from \"@/lib/telegram\";"," import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";","+import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";"," "," /**","  * Telegram webhook endpoint."]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_017akhbD8ZgcmT2mwwpfQ2v3","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0148GZXXq6jUT8gMx2PHT8DW","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","new_string":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":806,"cache_read_input_tokens":72445,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":806},"output_tokens":70,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"a96f24e0-2cba-401a-a695-e5c9d5c82eeb"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":806,"cache_read_input_tokens":72445,"output_tokens":259},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"70ab8c1b-2236-4334-b327-5daef93b65e0"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0148GZXXq6jUT8gMx2PHT8DW","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"d65899c5-3f2d-49e2-ac81-d4d96a9dec8f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:10.822Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","newString":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n      if (!telegramUserId) {\n        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const linkedUser = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (linkedUser) {\n        const listing = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n\n        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n          return;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":30,"oldLines":7,"newStart":30,"newLines":7,"lines":["     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });","   }","   const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");","-  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {","+  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {","     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","   }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Ke38g4kd8S16zokbJp9swL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_019GSwmf4gQWuCDPVWwHjbqK","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";","new_string":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":298,"cache_read_input_tokens":73251,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":298},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"bf68a36c-f187-4c8c-a6a4-2c932f414939"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019GSwmf4gQWuCDPVWwHjbqK","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"37151db2-8f07-4ba3-86df-ae3b728f56dd","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:14.685Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";","newString":"import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n  isValidSnowflake,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":7,"oldLines":6,"newStart":7,"newLines":7,"lines":["   isValidSnowflake,"," } from \"@/lib/discord\";"," import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";","+import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";"," "," /**","  * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events."]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01NTTU6Ejke8KoqsvY8XdrWd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_017n9Fm7ReXeENj6jkHruWFh","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","new_string":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":330,"cache_read_input_tokens":73549,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":330},"output_tokens":70,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"0a14b2a7-c0ca-4616-80a7-5bffda6313fd"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017n9Fm7ReXeENj6jkHruWFh","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"3320dddd-69cd-40a6-9ccf-2f83ccd761b1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:19.363Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","newString":"  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n  isValidSnowflake,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":27,"oldLines":7,"newStart":27,"newLines":7,"lines":["     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });","   }","   const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");","-  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {","+  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {","     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","   }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Ay1ycNUc5hrNYvyhEQRBeX","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"4833fe08-3736-4372-895b-03e98b160286","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:24.189Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts","oldString":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";","newString":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n\n/**\n * POST /api/telegram/setup\n *\n * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n *\n * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n  if (!setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!bot) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n  if (!success) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    ok: true,\n    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    webhookUrl,\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * GET /api/telegram/setup\n *\n * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n */\nexport async function GET() {\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":5,"newStart":1,"newLines":6,"lines":[" import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";"," import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";","+import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";"," "," /**","  * POST /api/telegram/setup"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_014WkrEn3q7pKssoYZnrB2pW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QW4p5B51DFLFeWY7L2wdim","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts","old_string":"  const body = await req.json();\n  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","new_string":"  const body = await req.json();\n  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":279,"cache_read_input_tokens":74169,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":279},"output_tokens":70,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"e4c8546d-93f5-45a6-b8d8-abc080af233c"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QW4p5B51DFLFeWY7L2wdim","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"d185f21b-2084-476d-9c1d-6959c2ed30cb","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:28.553Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts","oldString":"  const body = await req.json();\n  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","newString":"  const body = await req.json();\n  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n\n/**\n * POST /api/telegram/setup\n *\n * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n *\n * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n  if (!setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!bot) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n  if (!success) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    ok: true,\n    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    webhookUrl,\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * GET /api/telegram/setup\n *\n * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n */\nexport async function GET() {\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":20,"oldLines":7,"newStart":20,"newLines":7,"lines":["   }"," ","   const body = await req.json();","-  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {","+  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {","     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","   }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!botInfo) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    ok: true,\n    bot: {\n      id: botInfo.id,\n      username: botInfo.username,\n    },\n    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":5,"newStart":1,"newLines":6,"lines":[" import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";"," import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";","+import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";"," "," /**","  * Discord bot setup endpoint."]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0177orBL9cXwrPZWCxWuDD2k","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/setup/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"b3a2ed28-f0da-4e87-b125-b5cf4f3a9d66","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:37.405Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/setup/route.ts","oldString":"  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {","newString":"  if (!setupSecret || !secret || typeof secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(secret, setupSecret)) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n\n/**\n * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n *\n * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const { secret } = await req.json();\n  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n\n  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!botInfo) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    ok: true,\n    bot: {\n      id: botInfo.id,\n      username: botInfo.username,\n    },\n    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":12,"oldLines":7,"newStart":12,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const { secret } = await req.json();","   const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";"," ","-  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {","+  if (!setupSecret || !secret || typeof secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(secret, setupSecret)) {","     return NextResponse.json(","       { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },","       { status: 403 }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"230ed1a0-71c2-4c55-a3d7-2dde9a72bf48","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:45.568Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts","oldString":"    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {","newString":"    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses\n    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||\n        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||\n        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n  if (!allowed) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    if (startDate < today) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n      ? platformPreference\n      : \"telegram\";\n\n    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n        ? bookCoverUrl\n        : \"\";\n\n    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const result = db\n        .prepare(\n          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n        )\n        .run(\n          session.userId,\n          bookTitle.trim(),\n          bookAuthor.trim(),\n          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n          bookOlid || \"\",\n          language || \"English\",\n          readingPace.trim(),\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          size,\n          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n          platform\n        );\n\n      // Auto-join the author as a member\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n\n      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n    });\n\n    const listingId = createTransaction();\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { id: listingId },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":42,"oldLines":6,"newStart":42,"newLines":23,"lines":["       );","     }"," ","+    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses","+    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||","+        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||","+        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {","+      return NextResponse.json(","+        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },","+        { status: 400 }","+      );","+    }","+","+    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {","+      return NextResponse.json(","+        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },","+        { status: 400 }","+      );","+    }","+","     // Input length limits to prevent abuse","     if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {","       return NextResponse.json("]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
