   // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {","newString":"    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":157,"oldLines":13,"newStart":157,"newLines":13,"lines":["       platformPreference,","     } = body;"," ","-    // Validate fields that are provided","-    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {","+    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations","+    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {","       return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });","     }"," ","     if (startDate !== undefined) {","-      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {","+      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {","         return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });","       }","       const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01DgQd4BLVCtzQSbR7L8Zt5L","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015XY96GsohE8BYFWpjwU3gx","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {","new_string":"    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":527,"cache_read_input_tokens":75766,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":527},"output_tokens":71,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"789e9fc6-cf46-4733-9f00-c2443acc8ad4"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":527,"cache_read_input_tokens":75766,"output_tokens":191},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"75aac85a-75bb-470b-be03-e543a1bea5a7"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015XY96GsohE8BYFWpjwU3gx","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"b36ba683-fd5d-4eff-8667-8ced0897b2e8","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:06:56.559Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {","newString":"    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":172,"oldLines":7,"newStart":172,"newLines":7,"lines":["       }","     }"," ","-    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {","+    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {","       return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });","     }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VMLTd9owHpePJDzVt7o6sW","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"a9f7c4d7-471f-43db-abb8-6dccbcca6beb","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:07:01.438Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {","newString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":177,"oldLines":7,"newStart":177,"newLines":10,"lines":["     }"," ","     if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {","-      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);","+      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {","+        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });","+      }","+      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);","       if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {","         return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });","       }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01RPeiWFD4JNRa39CndP8vSp","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0134kE3RC1hTmFdJENdaGu42","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","old_string":"  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });","new_string":"  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const freshListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!freshListing) {\n      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    }\n\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":314,"cache_read_input_tokens":76524,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":314},"output_tokens":6,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"e0e0b71f-a5a1-4bc1-bf90-f2095152079f"}

 // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });","newString":"  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const freshListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!freshListing) {\n      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    }\n\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n  const pendingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (pendingApp) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":68,"oldLines":13,"newStart":68,"newLines":22,"lines":["   }"," ","   // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions","+  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH","   const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {","+    const freshListing = db","+      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","+      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;","+","+    if (!freshListing) {","+      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };","+    }","+","     const { count } = db","       .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","       .get(listingId) as { count: number };"," ","-    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","-      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };","+    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {","+      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };","     }"," ","     db.prepare("]},{"oldStart":82,"oldLines":11,"newStart":91,"newLines":11,"lines":["     ).run(listingId, session.userId);"," ","     const newCount = count + 1;","-    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","+    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {","       db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);","     }"," ","-    return { error: null, count: newCount };","+    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };","   });"," ","   const result = \"./email\";\n     3→\n     4→function getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n     5→  const user = db\n     6→    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n     7→    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n     8→  return user?.email || null;\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→export function createNotification(\n    12→  userId: number,\n    13→  listingId: number | null,\n    14→  type: string,\n    15→  message: string\n    16→) {\n    17→  db.prepare(\n    18→    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    19→  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n    20→\n    21→  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n    22→  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n    23→  if (email) {\n    24→    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    25→    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n    26→      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    27→    });\n    28→  }\n 30→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"9ab8c7fb-ce0b-4d7c-94f7-3088e2719255","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:07:29.708Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","content":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":30,"startLine":1,"totalLines":145}}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"d09bac37-b0fe-4947-9aba-3e5e08d0ff31","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:07:33.697Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";","newString":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\nimport { escapeHtmlForEmail } from \"./crypto-utils\";","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    case \"telegram_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    case \"discord_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":5,"newStart":1,"newLines":6,"lines":[" import db from \"./db\";"," import { sendEmail } from \"./email\";","+import { escapeHtmlForEmail } from \"./crypto-utils\";"," "," function getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {","   const user = db"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Tym8DYGTHVkbJoFeGW3j3m","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"f677cca6-c2a4-4ecb-b87d-6fed4774257e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:07:38.792Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });","newString":"    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    // HTML-escape the message to prevent injection via user-controlled content\n    // (display names, book titles) embedded in notification messages\n    const htmlBody = `<p>${escapeHtmlForEmail(message)}</p>`;\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message, htmlBody).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\nimport { escapeHtmlForEmail } from \"./crypto-utils\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    case \"telegram_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    case \"discord_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":23,"oldLines":7,"newStart":23,"newLines":10,"lines":["   const email = getUserEmail(userId);","   if (email) {","     const subject = getEmailSubject(type);","-    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {","+    // HTML-escape the message to prevent injection via user-controlled content","+    // (display names, book titles) embedded in notification messages","+    const htmlBody = `<p>${escapeHtmlForEmail(message)}</p>`;","+    sendEmail(email, subject, message, htmlBody).catch(() => {","       // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure","     });","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VoPFdRiPVedDidJmBvMNeb","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"633a589a-40e4-4939-aab4-e89f723e4575","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:08:22.362Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts","oldString":"    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);","newString":"    const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n  if (!allowed) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses\n    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||\n        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||\n        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    if (startDate < today) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n      ? platformPreference\n      : \"telegram\";\n\n    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n        ? bookCoverUrl\n        : \"\";\n\n    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const result = db\n        .prepare(\n          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n        )\n        .run(\n          session.userId,\n          bookTitle.trim(),\n          bookAuthor.trim(),\n          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n          bookOlid || \"\",\n          language || \"English\",\n          readingPace.trim(),\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          size,\n          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n          platform\n        );\n\n      // Auto-join the author as a member\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n\n      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n    });\n\n    const listingId = createTransaction();\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { id: listingId },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":89,"oldLines":7,"newStart":89,"newLines":7,"lines":["       );","     }"," ","-    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);","+    const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);","     if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {","       return NextResponse.json(","         { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_0151nFWtkMVUdT87Qsq1g2rj","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_017HQXRVKPaD7o2M27mByBVK","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN .claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create \\\n  --title \"Code review round 8: timing-safe secrets, type validation, stale data in transactions\" \\\n  --label \"bug,P1,approved\" \\\n  --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Issues Found\n\n1. **Critical**: Webhook and setup secrets compared with `!==` (timing oracle) — all 4 secret-guarded endpoints\n2. **High**: `maxGroupSize` accepts non-string/number types via `parseInt` coercion\n3. **High**: `readingPace`, `startDate`, `meetingFormat` not type-checked before string operations in PATCH\n4. **High**: Stale `max_group_size` used inside join transaction (concurrent PATCH could change it)\n5. **Important**: Notification messages with user-controlled content injected into HTML email body unescaped\n\n## Fix\n\n- Added `safeCompare()` utility using `crypto.timingSafeEqual` for all secret comparisons\n- Added `typeof` guards for all JSON body fields before string operations\n- Re-read `max_group_size` inside the join transaction for atomicity\n- Added `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utility for safe HTML email content\nEOF\n)\" 2>/dev/null","description":"Create GitHub issue"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":248,"cache_read_input_tokens":80870,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":248},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"193e328a-b88b-451b-a7c2-94df4a61af01"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01WwUAWcHTbr1R2kTin9vEun","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KM3gpaXer7FEbHnBFUeXmW","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create \\\n  --title \"Code review round 8: timing-safe secrets, type validation, stale data in transactions\" \\\n  --label \"bug,P1,approved\" \\\n  --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Issues Found\n\n1. **Critical**: Webhook and setup secrets compared with `!==` (timing oracle) — all 4 secret-guarded endpoints\n2. **High**: `maxGroupSize` accepts non-string/number types via `parseInt` coercion\n3. **High**: `readingPace`, `startDate`, `meetingFormat` not type-checked before string operations in PATCH\n4. **High**: Stale `max_group_size` used inside join transaction (concurrent PATCH could change it)\n5. **Important**: Notification messages with user-controlled content injected into HTML email body unescaped\n\n## Fix\n\n- Added `safeCompare()` utility using `crypto.timingSafeEqual` for all secret comparisons\n- Added `typeof` guards for all JSON body fields before string operations\n- Re-read `max_group_size` inside the join transaction for atomicity\n- Added `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utility for safe HTML email content\nEOF\n)\" 2>/dev/null","description":"Create GitHub issue"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":541,"cache_read_input_tokens":81118,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":541},"output_tokens":65,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"c82873b4-9298-4313-ac7e-d578402be602"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_011LBC1Ytj24Mpy43GNfj4Zo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01XhsfpG1iyG6XrqL8oi84jj","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: timing-safe secret comparison, input type validation, stale transaction data (#90)\n\n- Add crypto.timingSafeEqual for webhook/setup secret comparisons (prevents timing oracle)\n- Add typeof guards on all JSON body fields before string operations in create/PATCH routes\n- Re-read max_group_size inside join transaction to prevent stale data from concurrent PATCH\n- HTML-escape notification messages before embedding in email body (prevents XSS in emails)\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit code review fixes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":221,"cache_read_input_tokens":82240,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":221},"output_tokens":56,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"58f977f5-1377-4981-a80d-6ea06e9a13bf"}
