{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_014V15HK3Sj5Zt5ubnbEYuZL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Aq1fe2CDwB6HkPizCh3Fku","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: code review round 8 — timing-safe secrets, type validation, stale data\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- **Timing-safe secret comparison**: All 4 webhook/setup endpoints now use `crypto.timingSafeEqual` instead of `!==` to prevent timing oracle attacks on secret tokens\n- **Input type validation**: Added `typeof` guards for all JSON body fields (`maxGroupSize`, `readingPace`, `startDate`, `meetingFormat`) in create and PATCH routes to prevent type coercion bypasses\n- **Stale transaction data**: Join route now re-reads `max_group_size` inside the transaction to prevent a concurrent PATCH from changing the limit between the outer read and the transaction\n- **Email HTML escaping**: Notification messages containing user-controlled content (display names, book titles) are now HTML-escaped before embedding in email body\n\nCloses #90\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] All 198 existing tests pass\n- [x] Build succeeds\n- [x] Lint clean\n- [ ] CI pipeline validates\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\" 2>/dev/null","description":"Create pull request"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":272,"cache_read_input_tokens":82761,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":272},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"e5c626da-af03-4db4-bf44-9916dd00a0e7"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01ULKKyz26mAqNWjHgV2fncz","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Q9XRAKXyCj34ydbDAuXC8z","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-24_05-00.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-24 05:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: Healthy (uptime 1121s at start, DB connected, homepage renders correctly)\n- **Open Issues**: #54 (PAT expires ~March 27, needs-human — added 3-day reminder), #21 (Telegram bot token, needs-human)\n- **Open PRs**: None at start\n- **All PRD features**: Implemented\n- **All approved issues**: Completed\n\n## Work Done\n\n### Code Review Round 8 (#90, PR #91) — merged + deployed\nRan a comprehensive code review and found 5 actionable issues:\n\n1. **Critical — Timing-safe secret comparison**: All 4 webhook/setup endpoints (`telegram/webhook`, `discord/webhook`, `telegram/setup`, `discord/setup`) used `!==` for secret comparison, enabling timing oracle attacks. Fixed with `crypto.timingSafeEqual` via new `safeCompare()` utility in `lib/crypto-utils.ts`.\n\n2. **High — Input type validation in create route**: `maxGroupSize` and string fields (`bookTitle`, `bookAuthor`, `readingPace`, `startDate`, `meetingFormat`) lacked `typeof` checks before string operations, allowing non-string values to bypass validation via JS coercion. Added explicit type guards.\n\n3. **High — Input type validation in PATCH route**: Same issue for `readingPace`, `startDate`, `meetingFormat`, and `maxGroupSize` in the PATCH handler. Added `typeof` guards.\n\n4. **High — Stale `max_group_size` in join transaction**: The join route read `max_group_size` outside the transaction from a stale `listing` object. If a concurrent PATCH changed the group size between the outer read and the transaction, the wrong limit would be enforced. Fixed by re-reading `max_group_size` inside the transaction.\n\n5. **Important — HTML injection in email notifications**: Notification messages containing user-controlled content (display names, book titles) were injected verbatim as HTML email body. Added `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utility to sanitize content before embedding in emails.\n\n### Follow-ups\n- Added 3-day warning comment on #54 (PAT expiry)\n- #21 (Telegram token) still waiting — no human action\n\n## Deployment\n- Built and deployed via PM2 restart\n- Production verified healthy at 05:12 UTC\n\n## CI\n- PR #91: lint-and-build passed (55s)\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining\n2. Check #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. No approved issues remaining — consider proposals or E2E testing\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":173,"cache_read_input_tokens":85872,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":173},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"707f395c-bcbe-41d3-8e1b-14de1dddefeb"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MBgyjA3u19sLH2iHsjLUqH","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01TauhZAQgqGkG8squ2faguB","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-24_05-00-summary.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-24 05:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: Healthy (uptime 1121s at start, DB connected, homepage renders correctly)\n- **Open Issues**: #54 (PAT expires ~March 27, needs-human — added 3-day reminder), #21 (Telegram bot token, needs-human)\n- **Open PRs**: None at start\n- **All PRD features**: Implemented\n- **All approved issues**: Completed\n\n## Work Done\n\n### Code Review Round 8 (#90, PR #91) — merged + deployed\nRan a comprehensive code review and found 5 actionable issues:\n\n1. **Critical — Timing-safe secret comparison**: All 4 webhook/setup endpoints used `!==` for secret comparison, enabling timing oracle attacks. Fixed with `crypto.timingSafeEqual` via new `safeCompare()` utility.\n\n2. **High — Input type validation in create route**: `maxGroupSize` and string fields lacked `typeof` checks before string operations. Added explicit type guards.\n\n3. **High — Input type validation in PATCH route**: Same issue for PATCH handler fields. Added `typeof` guards.\n\n4. **High — Stale `max_group_size` in join transaction**: Join route read `max_group_size` outside transaction. Fixed by re-reading inside the transaction.\n\n5. **Important — HTML injection in email notifications**: User-controlled content injected verbatim as HTML email body. Added `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utility.\n\n### Follow-ups\n- Added 3-day warning comment on #54 (PAT expiry)\n- #21 (Telegram token) still waiting — no human action\n\n## Deployment\n- Built and deployed via PM2 restart\n- Production verified healthy at 05:12 UTC\n\n## CI\n- PR #91: lint-and-build passed (55s)\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining\n2. Check #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TauhZAQgqGkG8squ2faguB","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-24_05-00-summary.md"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"47b92380-ddfe-46f0-b53b-d7c21cff78a7","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:12:48.781Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-24_05-00-summary.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-24 05:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: Healthy (uptime 1121s at start, DB connected, homepage renders correctly)\n- **Open Issues**: #54 (PAT expires ~March 27, needs-human — added 3-day reminder), #21 (Telegram bot token, needs-human)\n- **Open PRs**: None at start\n- **All PRD features**: Implemented\n- **All approved issues**: Completed\n\n## Work Done\n\n### Code Review Round 8 (#90, PR #91) — merged + deployed\nRan a comprehensive code review and found 5 actionable issues:\n\n1. **Critical — Timing-safe secret comparison**: All 4 webhook/setup endpoints used `!==` for secret comparison, enabling timing oracle attacks. Fixed with `crypto.timingSafeEqual` via new `safeCompare()` utility.\n\n2. **High — Input type validation in create route**: `maxGroupSize` and string fields lacked `typeof` checks before string operations. Added explicit type guards.\n\n3. **High — Input type validation in PATCH route**: Same issue for PATCH handler fields. Added `typeof` guards.\n\n4. **High — Stale `max_group_size` in join transaction**: Join route read `max_group_size` outside transaction. Fixed by re-reading inside the transaction.\n\n5. **Important — HTML injection in email notifications**: User-controlled content injected verbatim as HTML email body. Added `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utility.\n\n### Follow-ups\n- Added 3-day warning comment on #54 (PAT expiry)\n- #21 (Telegram token) still waiting — no human action\n\n## Deployment\n- Built and deployed via PM2 restart\n- Production verified healthy at 05:12 UTC\n\n## CI\n- PR #91: lint-and-build passed (55s)\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining\n2. Check #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. No approved issues remaining — consider proposals or E2E testing\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

Closed Recently\n- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left","new_string":"## Closed Recently\n- #91: Code review round 8 — timing-safe Closed Recently\n- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left","newString":"## Closed Recently\n- #91: Code review round 8 — timing-safe secrets, type validation, stale transaction data, email HTML escaping — merged + deployed\n- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~3 days left","originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint clean (no warnings)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- Health endpoint: `/api/health` (DB check, uptime, stats)\n- Custom 404 page (branded, with CTA)\n- OG + Twitter Card meta tags on listing pages (book cover, title, description)\n- Loading skeletons on all routes (root, listing detail, profile, notifications)\n- Error boundaries on all routes with retry functionality\n- Focus-visible styles for keyboard accessibility\n- **Accessibility improvements** (PR #49, merged + deployed):\n  - ARIA labels, roles, expanded states on all interactive elements\n  - Keyboard navigation on BookSearch dropdown (combobox pattern)\n  - autocomplete attributes on auth forms\n  - role=\"alert\" on error messages\n  - Skip-to-content link\n  - role=\"tablist\"/tab/tabpanel on profile tabs\n  - role=\"radiogroup\"/radio on format/platform buttons\n  - role=\"checkbox\" with keyboard support on approval toggle\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Test Suite\n- 197 tests across 22 test files, all passing\n- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings (browse, detail, create, join, edit, delete, telegram, discord, auto-telegram, auto-discord), notifications, profile, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, ratings, rate-limit, telegram/setup, telegram/webhook, discord/setup, discord/webhook\n- All API routes now have test coverage\n- @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting\n\n## Components\n- `BookCover` — reusable book cover component with error fallback, uses `unoptimized` to bypass Next.js image proxy for Open Library covers that redirect through archive.org\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":44,"oldLines":15,"newStart":44,"newLines":15,"lines":[" - None"," "," ## Closed Recently","+- #91: Code review round 8 — timing-safe secrets, type validation, stale transaction data, email HTML escaping — merged + deployed"," - #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed"," - #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged"," - #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed"," - #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed","-- #79: Test coverage for listing CRUD, join, create routes — merged"," "," ## Open Issues"," - #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting","-- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left","+- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~3 days left"," "," ## Important Notes"," - GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals","newString":"## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes tested, 8 rounds of code review done — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals","originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint clean (no warnings)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- Health endpoint: `/api/health` (DB check, uptime, stats)\n- Custom 404 page (branded, with CTA)\n- OG + Twitter Card meta tags on listing pages (book cover, title, description)\n- Loading skeletons on all routes (root, listing detail, profile, notifications)\n- Error boundaries on all routes with retry functionality\n- Focus-visible styles for keyboard accessibility\n- **Accessibility improvements** (PR #49, merged + deployed):\n  - ARIA labels, roles, expanded states on all interactive elements\n  - Keyboard navigation on BookSearch dropdown (combobox pattern)\n  - autocomplete attributes on auth forms\n  - role=\"alert\" on error messages\n  - Skip-to-content link\n  - role=\"tablist\"/tab/tabpanel on profile tabs\n  - role=\"radiogroup\"/radio on format/platform buttons\n  - role=\"checkbox\" with keyboard support on approval toggle\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #91: Code review round 8 — timing-safe secrets, type validation, stale transaction data, email HTML escaping — merged + deployed\n- #87: Code review round 6 — logout fix, is_full reset, email subjects, webhook validation, fetch abort — merged + deployed\n- #85: Test coverage for Telegram and Discord API routes (69 new tests) — merged\n- #83: Code review round 5 — duplicate notifications, platform link timing, validation — merged + deployed\n- #81: Code review round 4 — email normalization, application state, rate limiter leak — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~3 days left\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Test Suite\n- 197 tests across 22 test files, all passing\n- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings (browse, detail, create, join, edit, delete, telegram, discord, auto-telegram, auto-discord), notifications, profile, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, ratings, rate-limit, telegram/setup, telegram/webhook, discord/setup, discord/webhook\n- All API routes now have test coverage\n- @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting\n\n## Components\n- `BookCover` — reusable book cover component with error fallback, uses `unoptimized` to bypass Next.js image proxy for Open Library covers that redirect through archive.org\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":89,"oldLines":4,"newStart":89,"newLines":4,"lines":[" 1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining, still needs-human"," 2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response"," 3. Check production health","-4. All routes now tested — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals","+4. All routes tested, 8 rounds of code review done — consider E2E testing, performance, or new feature proposals"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01ShRkBkmibKWmparZTAVsR8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01CVeqNdfRwGyWYnFboxAhF9","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/patterns.md","old_string":"- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references","new_string":"- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n\n## Security\n- Use `crypto.timingSafeEqual` for secret comparisons (not `!==`) to prevent timing oracle attacks\n- Always `typeof` check JSON body fields before string operations — `parseInt(obj)` silently coerces objects via `.toString()`\n- HTML-escape user-controlled content before embedding in email HTML body\n- Re-read mutable DB values inside transactions to prevent stale data from concurrent writes\n- `lib/crypto-utils.ts` provides `safeCompare()` and `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utilities"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":157,"cache_read_input_tokens":90047,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":157},"output_tokens":72,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"2f5d5bf3-a4db-45d7-9258-a12e4f205e3e"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CVeqNdfRwGyWYnFboxAhF9","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/patterns.md has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"af8e20d7-729c-4922-9889-91614f9e372a","uuid":"36c1fb4d-bf73-44ac-85d0-9e1d4434b87d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T05:13:16.169Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/patterns.md","oldString":"- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references","newString":"- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n\n## Security\n- Use `crypto.timingSafeEqual` for secret comparisons (not `!==`) to prevent timing oracle attacks\n- Always `typeof` check JSON body fields before string operations — `parseInt(obj)` silently coerces objects via `.toString()`\n- HTML-escape user-controlled content before embedding in email HTML body\n- Re-read mutable DB values inside transactions to prevent stale data from concurrent writes\n- `lib/crypto-utils.ts` provides `safeCompare()` and `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utilities","originalFile":"# Learned Patterns\n\n## GitHub Authentication\n- Always export GH_TOKEN from .env before running gh commands:\n  ```bash\n  export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2)\n  ```\n- Cannot `--add-reviewer` when token owner is the PR author (HTTP 422)\n- Repo created under TommyBrennan (not XanderZhu — can't create for other users)\n\n## Session Flow\n- First session bootstraps repo, creates issues from PRD as `approved` + `prd`\n- PRD features are pre-approved — no proposal step needed\n- Focus on housekeeping when blocked: organize project board, update memory\n\n## Environment\n- Find agent-browser with: `which agent-browser`\n- agent-browser requires `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp` prefix due to socket dir permissions\n- Playwright chromium needs manual install: `npx playwright install chromium`\n- Git remote uses PAT in URL: `https://ghp_...@github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate.git`\n- Git remote URL may lose PAT between sessions — re-set with `git remote set-url`\n- Must set `git config user.email` and `user.name` each session if not set globally\n\n## Build\n- Next.js 16 Turbopack fails in this environment (can't read /root dir)\n- Use Next.js 15 which defaults to webpack\n- Build from app/ directory: `cd app && npx next build`\n- `useRef<T>()` needs explicit `undefined` arg in React 19: `useRef<T>(undefined)`\n- better-sqlite3 `.all()` returns `unknown[]` — cast explicitly for TS\n\n## Browser Testing\n- agent-browser WORKS with: `export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"`\n- Crashes after extended use (~5+ min) due to Chromium memory pressure\n- Restart between recording scenes: `agent-browser close && rm -rf $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/agent-browser/ && sleep 2`\n- For snapshot timeouts on pages with many elements (e.g., book search dropdown), use `agent-browser screenshot` or JS eval instead\n- Book search results can't use `find text` (multiple matches) — use JS: `document.querySelector(\"button[type=button].w-full\").click()`\n- Reading pace input ref (@e17) times out — use `agent-browser eval` with nativeInputValueSetter to set values\n- For API testing: `curl -s URL | python3 -m json.tool`\n- ffmpeg: static binary at ~/bin/ffmpeg — `export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"` needed each session\n- When recording demos: login user BEFORE starting recording, then navigate to target page\n\n## Deployment\n- No root/sudo access — can't apt-get install, create systemd services, or install nginx\n- PM2 available via npx (not global): `npx pm2 start/stop/restart/list/logs`\n- Deploy script: `./scripts/deploy.sh` (pull, install, build, restart PM2)\n- Production runs on port 3000 directly (no reverse proxy)\n- Public IP: 89.167.127.85 (IPv4), 2a01:4f9:c013:600f::1 (IPv6)\n- Kill stale dev servers before deploy: check `ss -tlnp | grep 3000`\n- PM2 ecosystem config at `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- PM2 logs at `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n\n## React + SQLite\n- SQLite stores booleans as integers (0/1). In JSX, `{0 && <Component />}` renders \"0\" as text. Always use `!!value` or `Boolean(value)` for numeric fields in `&&` conditionals.\n- Git `add` with bracket directories like `[id]` needs escaping or use from project root\n\n## Security\n- Telegram webhook commands (/link, /link_ID) must verify the sender is the listing author via telegram_user_links table\n- Always validate external URLs before storing (e.g., book_cover_url must start with https://covers.openlibrary.org/)\n- Notification failures should never mask successful DB transactions — wrap in separate try/catch\n- Move related DB writes inside the same transaction for atomicity (e.g., rejection of pending apps when group fills)\n- Query string parameters from URL are always strings — parseInt() before DB queries on integer columns\n\n## Working Directory\n- Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate\n- App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app\n- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":64,"oldLines":3,"newStart":64,"newLines":10,"lines":[" - Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate"," - App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app"," - Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references","+","+## Security","+- Use `crypto.timingSafeEqual` for secret comparisons (not `!==`) to prevent timing oracle attacks","+- Always `typeof` check JSON body fields before string operations — `parseInt(obj)` silently coerces objects via `.toString()`","+- HTML-escape user-controlled content before embedding in email HTML body","+- Re-read mutable DB values inside transactions to prevent stale data from concurrent writes","+- `lib/crypto-utils.ts` provides `safeCompare()` and `escapeHtmlForEmail()` utilities"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
